notes.anchor: M. CICERO S. D. P. SERVILIO CONLEGAE.
notes.note: The letter-heading to Cicero's augural colleague (conlega) P. Servilius Vatia Isauricus the younger, proconsul of Asia (46-44 BC). S. D. = salutem dicit, "sends greeting," the standard epistolary formula.

notes.anchor: T. Agusius was my companion in that most wretched time, and the partner of all my journeyings, voyages, labours, and perils
notes.note: "That most wretched time" (illo miserrimo tempore) is Cicero's exile of 58-57 BC; he ranks recommendees by the depth of obligation, and Agusius's loyalty through the exile places him among the most strongly owed.
